---
layout: default
title: "Supreme Court Directives and Legislative Preparations for Monsoon Session"
date: 2026-07-16T21:44:34.872050+00:00
summary: "The Supreme Court issues key rulings on prisoner rights and language policy, while political parties prepare for the upcoming Monsoon Session of Parliament"
run_time_ist: "3:14AM"
---

<article class="digest-post">
  <a class="back-link" href="{{ '/' | relative_url }}">Political Brief</a>
  <p class="post-meta">Gemini Summary: 3:14AM</p>


<h2 class="section-title">India National Politics</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Prisoner welfare:</strong> The Supreme Court has directed the government to formulate a policy for the early release of elderly and terminally ill prisoners across the country.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I1</a> <a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I2</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Political realignments:</strong> Trinamool Congress leader Koel Mallick has resigned from her Rajya Sabha seat and held discussions with BJP leader Bhupender Yadav.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I3</a></span></li>
  <li><strong>Parliamentary agenda:</strong> The upcoming Monsoon Session is expected to feature the introduction of the FCRA and Shiksha Adhishthan bills, alongside a contentious push by the NDA for the Delimitation Bill, which the Congress party has vowed to oppose.<span class="source-chips"><a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMi--?oc=5&amp;hl=en-US&amp;gl=US&amp;ceid=US%3Aen" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">I6</a></span></li>
</ul>

<h2 class="section-title">Policy and Institutions</h2>

<ul class="digest-points">
  <li><strong>Language policy:</strong> The Supreme Court has advised against a third language policy, suggesting that if implemented, such instruction should commence in Class 6 rather than Class 9.</li>
  <li><strong>Aggregator regulation:</strong> Maharashtra has implemented a new cab aggregator policy that mandates formal licensing and introduces fare safeguards for passengers.</li>
</ul>
